name: @forgeax/bevy-3d-scene
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `3d_scene` example (a cube on a plane lit by a point light) — the canonical intro scene, standard-PBR + PointLight via direct world.spawn.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: intro-scene demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: intro-scene demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy 3d_scene reproduction
